name: AddClientToEnrollmentRequest
description: Implementation of the 'AddClientToEnrollmentRequest' model. Add Client To Enrollment Request Model

ClientId.description: The client IDs of the clients to add to the specified enrollments.

ClassScheduleId.description: The class schedule IDs of the enrollments to add the clients to. The ClassScheduleId can be found in GetEnrollments as the EnrollmentId.

EnrollDateForward.description: Enroll the clients from this date forward. `EnrollDateForward` takes priority over open enrollment. Default: **null**

Test.description:
When `true`, input information is validated, but not committed.
Default: **false**

SendEmail.description:
When `true`, indicates that the client should be sent an email. An email is only sent if the client has an email address and automatic emails have been set up.
Default: **false**

Waitlist.description: When `true`, the client is added to a specific enrollments waiting list. Default: **false**

WaitlistEntryId.description: The waiting list entry to add. Used to add a client to an enrollment from a waiting list entry.
